Tests the `toFixed` method of `Number.prototype` for correct string conversion with one decimal place.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `toFixed` method on the `Number` prototype in JavaScript. It verifies that calling `toFixed(1)` on the number `0` returns the string `"0.0"`. This test ensures that the `toFixed` method correctly formats a number to one decimal place. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of number formatting in JavaScript.
